_provenance: Distilled from picture-lock output/run-manifest.json as committed in the public repo (run started 2026-07-09T02:50:17.107Z, 60 logged calls). Stage costs = live spend plus original cost carried by cached artifacts (per-call costUsd + originalCostUsd). Receipt line items sum to $8.26 and reconcile line for line against the committed manifest: live spend $0.7786 + carried $7.4861 = $8.2647. The dub stage below is NOT part of this run; see its inThisRun flag and the _reconciliation note.

_reconciliation: Receipt lines aggregate the committed run-manifest snapshot: audio 0.28 + shots 4.40 + direction 3.50 + review 0.08 = 8.26 (artifactsTotalUsd). Summing the committed manifest reproduces it: per-call costUsd (live spend, 0.7786) + originalCostUsd (carried by cached artifacts, 7.4861) = 8.2647 across all 60 calls. Stage rows here are a coarser grouping of the manifest's own stages: council 3.59 = council 3.5042 + review 0.0846; sfx 0.07 = sfx 0.0180 + ambience 0.0560. THE SPANISH DUB IS NOT IN THIS RUN: the committed manifest has no dub stage at all (its only 'dub' string is a mograph title card, template 'dub-card', cached, $0). The dub rendered LIVE on 2026-07-08 from the same script for $0.4201, logged in the manifest committed at 2e51d27 (dubbing_id dzc6VNLa9wuUDBkOOoTx, out output/short.es.mp4). Do NOT add the dub into the headline figure: $8.26 is the cut, the dub is cited separately. Adding the stage rows including dub yields $8.68, a number that appears nowhere and should not be published. Build-time extras (discarded re-rolls, score/foley experiments, dub renders) were logged as they ran (~$14 at build) but are not carried by the committed manifest; the video's beat-12 receipt frame baked the at-cut manifest state ($9.51 carried) before a post-cut re-render consolidated the ledger.
